_pr_a4_0_note: STUB — PR-A4.0 reservation. The 5-fixture full set lands in PR-A4.1 alongside ClusterRunSeriesSchema (per RFC docs/rfcs/v8.7.0-conformance-measurability.md §5). Each fixture contains duplicate keys at various nesting depths (root, nested object, array element). Cross-runner gate asserts ALL 4 runners reject these as malformed JSON BEFORE schema validation. Some JSON parsers silently accept duplicates and use last-key-wins, which would cause cross-runner divergence.
